specific_mechanism: LIPSCHITZ-COEVOL: L̂ estimator + red maximizes violation + blue minimizes L + Pareto equilibrium
llm_application: Estimate worst-case input-to-output sensitivity via Lipschitz constant; coevolve attacker (maximizes L violation) and defender (minimizes L) iteratively; converge to game-theoretic equilibrium with provable L bound.
novelty_claim: RvB coevol exists but optimizes task-specific defense; Lipschitz-objective coevol is novel.
